title: PvP Utilities Pack
description: This project retextures some items used in PvP and SMP situations to make them more visible/clean.
body: This texture pack adds some useful PvP utilities. Shorter Swords, Cyan Cobwebs, Blue ancient debris outline, blue top for fully grown nether wart, feather textures for bows and crossbows, colour indicated bows and crossbows, Red Rimmed Rails. These are all things I find useful in a PvP/SMP environment. hope you enjoy :)
